name: @orderrx/extension
description: OrderRx Training Track Chrome Extension. M1 범위: 다중 테스터용 학습 데이터 수집. 상세: 06_execution/solo_milestones.md

scripts.build: ORDERRX_CHANNEL=pilot vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts
scripts.build:store: ORDERRX_CHANNEL=store vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts
